title: Jupiter in High-Res
transcript:
This is Jupiter in high-res.
Newly released photos from NASA's Juno spacecraft
gives us an unprecedented up-close look at the planet's colorfully turbulent atmosphere.
Is it just me, or does this look a lot like Vincent Van Gogh's famous painting, The Starry Night?
A NASA spokesperson called the gas giant's images "mind-blowingly brain-melting."
And that the images not only provide a spectacular look at Jupiter's swirling, turbulent atmosphere, but also...
countless revelations about the inner workings of this massive and mysterious planet.
